summary: Completed comprehensive UI-level RBAC testing for role-based navigation and financial data visibility. All tests passed. Fixed 1 bug: operator save was sending all form fields instead of just status.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: BookingDetailDialog saveChanges() was sending all formState fields for operators, causing 403 error. Now correctly sends only {status} for operators.
test_credentials: Superadmin: admin@pawstraining.com / <see Railway env var DEMO_ADMIN_PASSWORD>
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test users: tadmin@t.com (admin), top@t.com (operator)
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI-level RBAC fully tested. All role-based restrictions working correctly.

features_tested.superadmin_nav_items: ✓ All 8 items visible: Panel, Modo Operaciones, Reservas, Vista semanal, Programas, Capacidad, Usuarios, Configuración
features_tested.superadmin_booking_detail_all_fields: ✓ Shows: program price ($420), deposit amount, balance amount, overall payment badge, all form dropdowns
features_tested.admin_nav_items: ✓ 5 items visible: Panel, Modo Operaciones, Reservas, Vista semanal, Usuarios. Hidden: Programas, Capacidad, Configuración
features_tested.admin_bookings_access: ✓ Can access bookings with payment column visible
features_tested.operator_nav_items: ✓ Only 1 item visible: Reservas. All others hidden
features_tested.operator_booking_list_no_payment_column: ✓ Table headers: Client, Dog, Program, Week, Status (no Payment column)
features_tested.operator_booking_detail_financial_hidden: ✓ No program price, no deposit amount, no balance amount, no overall payment badge
features_tested.operator_booking_detail_simple_payment: ✓ Shows 'Comprobante de depósito: Pendiente' and 'Pago final: Pendiente' without amounts
features_tested.operator_booking_detail_only_status_drop: ✓ Only status dropdown visible. Hidden: payment_status, final_payment_status, certificate_status, eligibility_status, rejection_reason, internal_notes
features_tested.operator_upload_final_payment_hidden: ✓ Upload final payment button not visible
features_tested.operator_documents_section_visible: ✓ Deposit proof and vaccination certificate preview buttons visible
features_tested.operator_can_change_status: ✓ Successfully changed booking status from 'Pending Review' to 'Cancelled'

bug_fixed.issue: Operator save booking was failing with 403 error
bug_fixed.root_cause: saveChanges() in BookingDetailDialog was sending all formState fields including intake_date and delivery_date, but backend only allows operators to update 'status' field
bug_fixed.fix: Modified saveChanges() to send only {status: formState.status} when isOp is true
